pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly writes the initial GMAT script to this path.
export_result.sh expects the text report to be saved at this path.
verifier.py enforces a default radper_tol of 1.0 km.
verifier.py enforces a default inc_tol of 0.5 deg.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated GMAT script located at /home/ga/Documents/missions/venus_tcm_baseline.script. The explicitly targeted flyby parameters are 6351.8 km for Venus periapsis radius (with a 1.0 km tolerance) and 105.0 degrees for inclination (with a 0.5 deg tolerance), which are successfully scored by verifier.py. The expected output report path is /home/ga/GMAT_output/tcm_report.txt.
